title: Board start date and end date in API V2
excerpt: Since some apps that integrate their Monday with their platform consider each board a project which includes subtasks (items), it will be helpful to create a start date and due date field in the boards endpoint. The star…

posts.author: sufian27 (Sufian Mushtaq)
posts.cookedHtml: Since some apps that integrate their Monday with their platform consider each board a project which includes subtasks (items), it will be helpful to create a start date and due date field in the boards endpoint. The start date can be calculated by looking at the “created at” date in the activity logs of the board and the end date can be calculated by looking at the latest end date of the current items in the board.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @sufian27

Thanks for providing your suggestion - we appreciate the opportunity to improve I am sure adding something like this in the future might help builders save some time coding.

-Alex
